mapper.insert: insert into virtual_delivery(order_id, seller_user_id, delivery_type, delivery_content, status, delivered_at) values(#{orderId}, #{sellerUserId}, #{deliveryType}, #{deliveryContent}, #{status}, #{deliveredAt})
mapper.select: select delivery_id, order_id, seller_user_id, delivery_type, delivery_content, status, delivered_at, create_time from virtual_delivery where order_id = #{orderId} order by delivery_id asc
